-{"id":"gt-t5uk","title":"Deacon trigger-pending-spawns: Auto-nudge polecats when ready","description":"The Deacon's mol-deacon-patrol defines a trigger-pending-spawns step, but it's not implemented.

## Problem
After gt spawn creates a polecat session, Claude initializes for 10-20s. Nobody sends the initial 'Begin.' message to start work, so polecats sit at prompts forever.

## Current Workaround
Manual: gt nudge gt-<rig>-<polecat> 'Begin.'

## Required Implementation
1. Track pending spawns (polecats spawned but not triggered)
2. In Deacon patrol, poll WaitForClaudeReady for each pending spawn
3. When ready, send 'Begin.' via NudgeSession
4. Mark as triggered

## Evidence
Tracer bullet 2025-12-23: Had to manually nudge polecat/tracer to start work.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T21:58:26.070984-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T21:58:26.070984-08:00"}

 {"id":"gt-tca","title":"Polecats should auto-cleanup after MR submission","description":"Currently polecats must manually run 'gt handoff --shutdown' after completing work. This is error-prone and leaves stale polecats around.

## Desired Flow

1. Polecat completes work
2. Polecat runs 'gt mq submit' (or similar)
3. MR is added to integration queue
4. **Polecat automatically cleans up** (no manual handoff needed)

## Implementation Options

### Option A: mq submit triggers cleanup
In 'gt mq submit':
1. Submit MR to queue
2. Automatically run cleanup (same as gt handoff --shutdown)
3. Polecat session terminates

### Option B: Refinery triggers cleanup
When Refinery picks up MR:
1. Refinery processes MR
2. Sends message to Witness: 'CLEANUP: <polecat>'
3. Witness cleans up polecat

### Option C: Molecule-driven
Define cleanup as final phase of polecat-work molecule:
1. code → test → submit-mr → cleanup

## Note
This reinforces the ephemeral model: polecats exist only for the duration of a single task.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-20T15:22:54.485456-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T11:44:14.020856-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T11:44:14.020856-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented: mq submit now auto-cleanups polecats after MR submission","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-tca","depends_on_id":"gt-9nf","type":"related","created_at":"2025-12-20T15:40:08.998908-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
